user.title: Daikin Comfort Control Smart Temperature
user.description: Select the Daikin device to control. The base integration must already be configured.

abort.no_daikin_devices: No Daikin devices found. Install and configure daikin_comfort_control first.
abort.already_configured: This device already has smart temperature control configured.

data.tolerance: Tolerance band (°F) — no action within this range
data.summer_heat_min_temp: Summer: minimum indoor temp before heating (°F)
data.summer_heat_night_only: Summer: allow heating only at night
data.outdoor_heat_max: Summer: max outdoor temp to allow heating (°F)
data.fan_ceiling_temp: Fan-only ceiling temp (°F) — force cool above this
data.forecast_check_interval_cycles: Forecast check frequency (every N poll cycles)
data.precool_rise_threshold: Pre-cool trigger: outdoor rise over 30 min (°F)
data.safety_override_delta: Safety bypass: force correction if delta exceeds (°F)
data.mode_switch_min: Min time between mode switches (seconds, min 60)

error.invalid_temp_range: Minimum temperature cannot be greater than maximum temperature.
error.at_least_one_hvac_mode: At least one HVAC mode must be enabled.
